function_v0.doc:
Execute one Soroswap swap along `path` on behalf of `user`.

Flow:
1. user authorizes this invocation
2. pull `amount_in` of `token_in` from user into this contract
3. pre-authorize the router to pull `token_in` from this
contract into the Soroswap `pool`, then call the router
4. enforce `amount_out_min` on the output
5. forward the proceeds to `user`

`pool` is the Soroswap pair contract for (token_in, token_out).
It is an explicit argument only for the S1 single-hop case; the
S4 multi-stage executor derives the auth subtree from the plan.

Returns the amount of `token_out` delivered.
function_v0.name: swap_soroswap
